description: Request a small, scoped product or engineering improvement

labels: ["feature"]

## Objective

What should be added or improved?

## Background

Why is this needed now?

## Target user / operator

Who benefits from this change?

What may be changed?

## Out of scope

## Validation method

How should this be tested or verified?

## Risk level

Choose one:

- [ ] Low: documentation or non-destructive UI copy only
- [ ] Medium: frontend or API behavior change
- [ ] High: production, billing, secrets, personal data, or infrastructure impact

## Merge policy

Choose one:

- [ ] AI may merge after checks pass
- [ ] Human approval required before merge

## Notes for AI agents

Read `AGENTS.md` before working on this issue.
